calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2007 Off Calendar

Quiet Title In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-14-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Quiet Title Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Sonia Wong.
Jonathan M. Blute, Esq. for Plaintiff: Marcia A. Sumpter, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Marcia A. Sumpter and against the Defaulted Defendants: FCM Corporation, dba Financial Center Mortgage, Albert Henley and Patricia Kirby-Kelly, as follows:
Right to the property located at 558 Chenery, San Francisco.
(See scanned document for details of the judgment and details of the subject property.)
Judgment signed in open court.
